title: Design System: CNC Quality Inspection KPI App

display.purpose: Page titles and major dashboard numbers only.

body.purpose: Operational text, table cells, forms, and helper copy.

shadows.name: surface-medium
shadows.purpose: Analytics cards and dense dashboard panels.

shadows.name: overlay-medium
shadows.purpose: Menus, popovers, tooltips, and mobile drawers.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Color, border, and shadow changes for controls.

motion.name: card-hover
motion.purpose: Existing dashboard card hover motion; keep subtle.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button for forms, saves, and primary workflow steps.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgb(37 99 235 / 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Mobile Inspection Button
components.description: Large touch-first action for mobile inspection screens.
components.css: .ds-btn-mobile { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-mobile:hover { background: rgb(37 99 235 / 0.9); } .ds-btn-mobile:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input with visible focus treatment and mobile-safe text size.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; min-height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; background: #ffffff; color: #020817; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.4; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-input:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Operational Card
components.description: Default surface for KPI groups, charts, forms, and management panels.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #020817; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; }

components.name: Status Badges
components.description: Compact pass/fail/warning labels that must include text, not color alone.
components.css: .ds-badge-pass, .ds-badge-fail, .ds-badge-warning { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 22px; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-badge-pass { background: #16a34a; color: #ffffff; } .ds-badge-fail { background: #ef4444; color: #ffffff; } .ds-badge-warning { background: #facc15; color: #020817; }

components.name: Data Table
components.description: Dense but readable table treatment for SPC, defects, reports, and management data.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #020817; } .ds-table th { height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; text-align: left; color: #64748b; font-weight: 500; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: rgb(241 245 249 / 0.5); } .ds-table td { padding: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; vertical-align: middle; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: rgb(241 245 249 / 0.5); }

components.name: Mobile Bottom Navigation
components.description: Primary mobile navigation pattern for inspector-first workflows.
components.css: .ds-mobile-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; min-height: 64px; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 -1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.08); } .ds-mobile-nav button { flex: 1; min-height: 48px; border: 0; background: transparent; color: #64748b; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; } .ds-mobile-nav button.is-active { color: #2563eb; font-weight: 600; } .ds-mobile-nav button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: -2px; }

narrative.overview: This design system supports two modes at once: stable factory-floor operation and clear data-based quality analysis. The interface should feel like a durable operations console, not a promotional SaaS surface. It must help inspectors enter measurements quickly on mobile devices, then help managers understand quality patterns without decorative noise.
keyCharacteristics: Stable operations first, analysis second, decoration never.
Mobile inspection interactions must be readable, touchable, and fast.
Status is communicated with color, label, icon, and position, never color alone.
Data views should be dense but calm, with clear scan paths and compact controls.
Korean and Vietnamese text expansion must be treated as normal, not an edge case.

rules.name: The Status Must Speak Twice Rule
rules.body: Pass, fail, warning, and process states must use text or icon support in addition to color. A color-blind user must still understand the state.

rules.name: The Blue Means Action Rule
rules.body: Operational Blue is for current location, focus, links, and primary actions. Do not use it as decorative fill across whole screens.

rules.name: The No Neon Analytics Rule
rules.body: Charts may use green, red, blue, yellow, and orange, but analysis screens must not turn into dark neon dashboards.

rules.name: The Readable Translation Rule
rules.body: Korean and Vietnamese labels must fit without clipping. Do not size buttons, tabs, or nav items around the shortest language.

rules.name: The Stable Surface Rule
rules.body: Surfaces should feel anchored. Hover lift is allowed for data cards, but large translation or dramatic elevation is prohibited.

dos: Do design mobile inspection as the primary workflow, with 44-48px touch targets and clear next actions.
Do keep analysis screens dense but calm: tables, charts, filters, and cards should form a clear scan path.
Do use Operational Blue for action, selection, focus, and navigation state.
Do pair every pass/fail/warning color with text, icon, or position.
Do preserve Korean and Vietnamese translation support for all user-facing UI text.
Do use charts to clarify manufacturing quality patterns, not to decorate dashboards.
donts: Don't make this look like a flashy SaaS landing page.
Don't use marketing-style hero sections, decorative gradients, oversized promotional copy, or animated spectacle inside the product UI.
Don't create dense tables or small controls that are difficult to operate on mobile or tablet screens.
Don't fragment every piece of information into excessive card grids.
Don't use decorative motion, visual noise, or styling that slows down scanning.
Don't turn analytics into a dark neon dashboard unless a specific workflow later proves dark mode is necessary.
Don't hardcode UI text in Korean, Vietnamese, or English. Use the i18n translation system.
